parameter.value:
<script>
  (function() {
    var startEngage = new Date().getTime();
    var timeEngaged = 0;
    var idleTime = 0;
    var idle = true;
    var idleReport = false;
    var idleTimer, reportTimer;
    
    /*  Set the user as idle, and calculate the time
        they were non-idle */
    var setIdle = function() {
      idleTime = new Date().getTime();
      timeEngaged += idleTime - startEngage;
      idle = true;
    };
    
    /*  Reset the 5 second idle timer.
        If the user was idle, start the non-idle timer */
    var pulse = function(evt) {
      if (idle) {
        idle = false;
        startEngage = new Date().getTime();
        idleReport = false;
      }
      window.clearTimeout(idleTimer);
      idleTimer = window.setTimeout(setIdle, 5000); 
    };    
    
    //  Utility function for attaching listeners to the window
    var addListener = function(evt, cb) {
      if (window.addEventListener) {
        window.addEventListener(evt, cb);
      } else if (window.attachEvent) {
        window.attachEvent('on' + evt, cb);
      }
    };
    
    /* Push an event to dataLayer every 15 seconds
       unless the user is idle.
       Also, push an event when the user leaves the page */
    var report = function(evt) {
      if (!idle) {
        timeEngaged += new Date().getTime() - startEngage;
      }

      // Push the payload to dataLayer, and only push valid time values
      if (!idleReport && timeEngaged > 0 && timeEngaged < 3600000) { 
	    window.dataLayer.push({
    	  'event' : 'nonIdle',
          'nonIdleTimeElapsed' : timeEngaged
        });
      }
      if (idle) {
        idleReport = true;
      }
      
      // Fix possible beforeunload duplication problem
      if (evt && evt.type === 'beforeunload') {
	    window.removeEventListener('beforeunload', report);
      }
      timeEngaged = 0;
      startEngage = new Date().getTime();
      reportTimer = window.setTimeout(report, 15000);
    };
    
    addListener('mousedown', pulse);
    addListener('keydown', pulse);
    addListener('scroll', pulse);
    addListener('mousemove', pulse);
    addListener('beforeunload', report);
    idleTimer = window.setTimeout(setIdle, 5000);
    reportTimer = window.setTimeout(report, 15000);
  })();
</script>

<script>
  // Compile Values.
  var utm_array = [];
  var utm_source = {{Query - utm_source}}
  if (utm_source !== 'not set') {
    utm_array.push('utm_source=' + utm_source);
  }
  
  var utm_medium = {{Query - utm_medium}};
  if (utm_medium !== 'not set') {
    utm_array.push('utm_medium=' + utm_medium);
  }
  
  var utm_campaign = {{Query - utm_campaign}};
  if (utm_campaign !== 'not set') {
    utm_array.push('utm_campaign=' + utm_campaign);
  }
  
  var utm_content = {{Query - utm_content}};
  if (utm_content !== 'not set') {
    utm_array.push('utm_content=' + utm_content);
  }
  
  var utm_term = {{Query - utm_term}};
  if (utm_term !== 'not set') {
    utm_array.push('utm_term=' + utm_term);
  }
  
  // Combine all valid UTMs into one query string.
  var queryString = utm_array.join("&");
  
  // Grab each element that points to target domain.
  var outboundButtons = document.querySelectorAll("a[href*='.brighthorizons.com']:not([href*='pages.brighthorizons.com'])");
  
  // Loop through each element
  for (var i = 0; i < outboundButtons.length; i++) {
    var undecoratedLink = outboundButtons[i].href;
    // ensure that the link has not been deocrated yet
    if (!undecoratedLink.includes("utm_source=")) {
        // if other params exist, append with '&'
        if (undecoratedLink.includes('?')) {
          outboundButtons[i].setAttribute("href", undecoratedLink + '&' + queryString);
        } else {
          outboundButtons[i].setAttribute("href", undecoratedLink + '?' + queryString);
        }
    }
  }
  
</script>

<script type="text/javascript">
(function(window) {

    addEvent(window, 'message', function(message) {
      try{
      var data = JSON.parse(message.data);
      var dataLayer = window.dataLayer || (window.dataLayer = []);
      if (data.event) {
        dataLayer.push({
          'event': data.event,
          'postMessageData': data
        });
      }
      }catch(e){}
    });

    // Cross-browser event listener
    function addEvent(el, evt, fn) {
      if (el.addEventListener) {
        el.addEventListener(evt, fn);
      } else if (el.attachEvent) {
        el.attachEvent('on' + evt, function(evt) {
          fn.call(el, evt);
        });
      } else if (typeof el['on' + evt] === 'undefined' || el['on' + evt] === null) {
        el['on' + evt] = function(evt) {
          fn.call(el, evt);
        };
      }
    }

  })(window);
</script>

<script>
(function (window, document) {
  'use strict';
 
  // Prevent multiple installations
  if (window.__gtmEnrollmentPhoneListenerAdded) return;
  window.__gtmEnrollmentPhoneListenerAdded = true;
 
  // Lightweight global listener (capture phase)
  document.addEventListener(
    'click',
    function (e) {
      try {
        // Ignore right/middle clicks or modified clicks (Ctrl, Cmd, Shift, Alt)
        if (e.button !== 0 || e.metaKey || e.ctrlKey || e.shiftKey || e.altKey) return;
 
        // Get the full event path (handles shadow DOM / Angular layers)
        var path = (e && typeof e.composedPath === 'function') ? e.composedPath() : [];
        var anchor = null;
 
        // Find the first <a> element in the path
        if (Array.isArray(path)) {
          for (var i = 0; i < path.length; i++) {
            var n = path[i];
            if (n && n.tagName === 'A') {
              anchor = n;
              break;
            }
          }
        }
 
        // Fallback for browsers without composedPath()
        if (!anchor && e.target && e.target.closest) {
          anchor = e.target.closest('a');
        }
 
        // Fire only for the enrollment phone link
        if (
          anchor &&
          (anchor.id === 'gtm-enrollment-phone' ||
            /gtm-enrollment-phone/i.test(anchor.getAttribute('id') || ''))
        ) {
          window.dataLayer = window.dataLayer || [];
          window.dataLayer.push({
            event: 'enrollment_phone_click',
            link_id: 'gtm-enrollment-phone',
            link_href: anchor.href || '',
            link_text: (anchor.textContent || '').trim()
          });
        }
      } catch (err) {
        // Fail silently  never break site code
        // console.debug('GTM enrollment phone listener error:', err);
      }
    },
    true // capture phase so it runs before framework handlers
  );
})(window, document);
</script>
